description: 48Labs cross-repo sync state — tracks convergence progress across 48labs-design, 48labs-website, 48labs-portal

1.name: CSS variables and Tailwind alias parity
changes: 48labs-website/src/index.css: added --interactive-hover to light and dark themes
48labs-website/src/index.css: updated --panel-elevated dark to #243347 (was #1E293B, same as --panel-bg)
48labs-website/tailwind.config.js: added full semantic alias layer (canvas, surface, elevated, on-surface, on-surface-secondary, on-surface-muted, border-soft, border-hard, interactive)
1.notes: Portal --panel-elevated dark remains #1E293B (intentionally not touched). Website now leads with #243347 for visual elevation distinction.

2.name: Shared component primitives
changes: 48labs-website/index.html: added data-theme="dark" to <html> — foundational fix enabling all CSS custom property tokens to resolve
48labs-website/src/components/ui/button.jsx: outline variant updated from slate-600/slate-200/slate-700/white to border-hard/on-surface/elevated — now matches portal verbatim

48labs-website/src/components/MarketingHeader.jsx: slate-* → semantic tokens (on-surface, on-surface-secondary, on-surface-muted, border-border-soft, bg-interactive); api.entities.AppSetting → getAppSettingByKey() domain import
48labs-website/src/components/MarketingFooter.jsx: same token + domain import fixes
2.notes: All other Shadcn base components (input, select, textarea, dialog, etc.) confirmed identical between website and portal — no changes needed. Portal-specific primitives (PortalTable, PortalDrawer, TabBar, etc.) are portal-only by design.

3.name: Website pages token compliance
changes: 36 files: slate-950/900/800/700/600 → bg-canvas/elevated, text-on-surface/secondary/muted, border-border-soft/hard, hover:bg-interactive
6 files: gradient slate (from-slate-*, via-slate-*, to-slate-*) → from-canvas/via-elevated/to-elevated
6 files: placeholder-slate-* (v2 format) → placeholder:text-on-surface-muted
45 files: solid text-white (non-button contexts) → text-on-surface; text-white/xx opacity variants intentionally preserved (design effect on ultra-dark #0a0a0a pages)
Scope: all files in 48labs-website/src/pages/ and 48labs-website/src/components/
3.notes: Landing.jsx and GuestBooking.jsx retain text-white/xx opacity variants by design — these are intentional luminance-layering effects on bg-[#0a0a0a] pages. Build clean (exit 0).

4.name: Booking engine (website-facing)
changes: 13 files: api.entities.* → direct domain imports (Room, AddOn, GlobalAddOn, Service, MembershipPlan, CreditBundle, CreditConfiguration, CreditPricingTier, PricingSettings, PricingItem, MarketingMedia, HeroSettings, Client, Invite, OperatingHours)
Modules used: @/lib/domains/pricing, @/lib/domains/system, @/lib/domains/clients, @/lib/domains/users, @/lib/domains/bookings

8 files correctly left with api import intact — they only use api.functions.invoke() which has no domain equivalent yet (processUnifiedPurchase, googleCalendarManager, getRoomAvailability, submitTourRequest, submitContactForm, createMembershipAccount)
4.notes: api.functions.invoke() calls stay until edge function equivalents are built into domain layer. Build clean (exit 0).

5.name: Portal pages token compliance
changes: 9 files: remaining slate-* gradient tokens → from-canvas/via-elevated/to-elevated (Landing, RoomProfile, Services, Studios, RoomStudioPreview, WebsitePreviewCard, ThankYouScreen, FiveMinWarning)
MonthCalendar.jsx: border-t-slate-700 → border-t-border-soft (tooltip arrows)
BookingFlow.jsx: bg-white headers → bg-canvas (theme-aware surface fix)
bg-white/[0.0x] and text-white/xx opacity variants intentionally preserved (forced-dark pages: Landing, GuestBooking, About, OnboardingForm)
Decorative bg-white (toggle thumbs, document preview backgrounds, signature containers) intentionally preserved
5.notes: Portal was already largely clean from prior session. This pass cleared the remaining gradient slate tokens and the two bg-white header instances in BookingFlow. Build clean (exit 0).

6.name: Booking engine (portal-facing)
6.notes: Already complete from prior session (Domain + Query Normalization CLAIM-003). Zero api.entities.* or data.entities.* calls found in portal pages or components at audit time.

1.name: Write SESSION_INSTRUCTIONS.md
1.notes: 10-section document for Base44 session start. Covers all systems, token patterns, component primitives, naming conventions, architecture rules, and common mistakes.

2.name: Write CLAUDE_STANDARDS.md
2.notes: Full token reference, component pattern catalog with usage examples, naming conventions, data layer rules, token parity table.

3.name: Write PROJECT_STATE.md
3.notes: All major systems documented, recent refactors listed, deprecated patterns table, deferred items table, build status.

4.name: Configure Base44 Superagent
4.notes: Monitor commits to 48labs-design, compare diff against manifest.json, update drift-log.md in real-time, classify changes as new/modified/conflicting.

5.name: Push 48labs-sync to GitHub
5.notes: git init + push to https://github.com/Cinedex/48labs-sync.git (org: Cinedex). Required for Base44 to fetch SESSION_INSTRUCTIONS.md via raw URL.

SESSION_INSTRUCTIONS.md.purpose: Base44 fetches this at every session start. What exists, what not to rebuild, current patterns.

CLAUDE_STANDARDS.md.purpose: Full token reference, component patterns, naming rules.

PROJECT_STATE.md.purpose: All major systems, recent refactors, deprecated items.

drift-log.md.purpose: Human-readable record of what drifted between repos and how it was resolved.

manifest.json.purpose: Machine-readable phase/step state, sync file registry, token parity table.

tailwind_aliases.48labs-portal: raw tokens + full semantic layer + status colors + interactive
tailwind_aliases.48labs-website: raw tokens + full semantic layer + interactive (no status colors)
